notation: A key ending with '?' in this summary means optional and should be omitted when empty/false/n/a. The actual JSON key name must not include '?'.

thought?.content: string; optional private reasoning draft. Not shown to the user; useful for complex multi-step tasks; omit for simple Q&A.
thought?.durable: boolean; optional. Default false. Set true only when this reasoning draft should remain visible to you in later prompt context.

fields.continue: boolean; required. Use true while more model/runtime work is needed. Use false only for the final answer.
fields.next_actions?: array<object>; required when continue is true. With continue false, allowed only for guarded finalize: the last action must include expect and expect_timeout_ms.
fields.report_job_progress?: string; progress or final answer text. With continue true, it is progress shown in the Thought / Action panel and next_actions must continue the work. With continue false and no next_actions, it is the final answer. With continue false plus guarded finalize next_actions, this final answer is shown only after the last action's expect check passes.

additional_properties: Do not add extra top-level fields beyond this summary.

action_object_spec.description: Each item in next_actions must be an object with these fields:
action_object_spec.action: string; required. Canonical tool name from Tool_capability.tool_catalog. Do not invent names.
action_object_spec.intent: string; required. Concise user-visible reason for the action.
action_object_spec.input: object; required. Tool-specific input fields as defined in tool_catalog. For guarded finalize only, the last action input may include expect and expect_timeout_ms as a final verification shell command.
